prompt_text:
### Demographics: 39-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes during urgent care evaluation for fatigue/blurred vision
Current symptoms: Postprandial fatigue and thirst noted; no DKA/HHS signs; no recent hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
Heart failure: HFrEF (NYHA Class III)
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF: HFrEF (NYHA Class III); ASCVD (No); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: No family history of type 2 diabetes (elicited)
- Social history: Current smoker (10 cigarettes/day for 5 years; ~2.5 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Insulin Degludec 20units once daily; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily), Nitrofurantoin (100 mg twice daily for prophylaxis)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 97.2 kg; Height 169.3 cm; BMI 33.9 kg/m²; Blood pressure 128/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 10.7%; 9 months ago 11.0%; 6 months ago 11.0%; 3 months ago 10.5%; current 10.5%), FPG (12 months ago 265mg/dL; 9 months ago 320mg/dL; 6 months ago 320mg/dL; 3 months ago 298mg/dL; current 229mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 97.7kg; 9 months ago 94.1kg; 6 months ago 93.7kg; 3 months ago 94.8kg; current 97.2kg), Height (12 months ago 169.3cm; 9 months ago 169.3cm; 6 months ago 169.3cm; 3 months ago 169.3cm; current 169.3cm), BMI (12 months ago 34.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 33.0kg/m²; current 33.9kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 128mmHg; 6 months ago 126mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 128mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 78mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 78mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 91U/L; 9 months ago 92U/L; 6 months ago 77U/L; 3 months ago 80U/L; current 94U/L), AST (12 months ago 92U/L; 9 months ago 79U/L; 6 months ago 73U/L; 3 months ago 65U/L; current 87U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.1mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 46mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 46mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 41mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 44mL/min/1.73m²; current 42mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 126mg/g; 9 months ago 196mg/g; 6 months ago 196mg/g; 3 months ago 161mg/g; current 201mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 83mg/dL; 9 months ago 90mg/dL; 6 months ago 82mg/dL; 3 months ago 84mg/dL; current 86mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 51mg/dL; 9 months ago 50mg/dL; 6 months ago 53mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 159mg/dL; 9 months ago 175mg/dL; 6 months ago 154mg/dL; 3 months ago 157mg/dL; current 164mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 11.3g/dL; 9 months ago 10.6g/dL; 6 months ago 10.7g/dL; 3 months ago 10.6g/dL; current 10.9g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
